creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
Update port: security/portsentry

* Update to 0.99.1/remove from the portsurvey bad-boy list.

Also:

* Email to maintainer has been undeliverable for 3 days (host is
  unreachable):

-Queue ID- --Size-- ----Arrival Time---- -Sender/Recipient-------
C70F49B36      3264 Wed Nov 24 03:20:27  jedgar@fxp.org
                                    (connect to whet.org: Operation timed out)
                                         chris@still.whet.org

* Maintainer has not been active with this port since submission
  (December 1998); if email continues to be unreachable, I suggest
  MAINTAINER be moved to ports@freebsd.org
